# WebCaretakers

> Free online calculators for web, marketing, AI, SEO, and small business tech.

## Pages

- [WebCaretakers | Free online calculators, no sign-up, workings shown](https://webcaretakers.com/): Small, focused online calculators for everyday decisions. Every tool runs in your browser, no sign-up, and every result shows its workings.
- [About WebCaretakers | Andrew Laws](https://webcaretakers.com/about/): WebCaretakers is a free calculator hub built and maintained by Andrew Laws, an SEO and web practitioner since 1999. Here is who is behind it and why it exists.
- [Andrew Laws | Author and calculator builder, WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/author/andrew-laws/): Andrew Laws is the author and builder of every calculator on WebCaretakers. SEO and web practitioner since 1999, founder of Yeseo. Full list of tools by category.
- [All Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/): Every calculator on WebCaretakers, grouped by category. Browse broadband, finance, health, property and more. No sign-up, browser-only, show the workings.
- [AI Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/): Calculators for working with AI APIs and language models. Token estimation, cost projection across providers, all browser-based with no sign-up.
- [AI vs Human Writer Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/ai-vs-human-writer-cost-calculator/): Compare the monthly cost of producing written content with an LLM versus a human writer. Per-word and per-hour rates, model pricing, breakeven and side-by-side model table.
- [Embedding Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/embedding-cost-calculator/): Estimate the cost of generating embeddings for a corpus. OpenAI, Cohere, Voyage and custom pricing, with one-off, monthly, weekly or daily refresh options.
- [AI Fine-Tuning Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/fine-tuning-cost-calculator/): Estimate the cost of fine-tuning an LLM. Training cost across GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Llama-3 on Together, and Mistral-7B, with hosted inference cost for the tuned model. USD, no sign-up.
- [AI Hallucination Risk Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/hallucination-risk-calculator/): Score the relative risk that an LLM output will hallucinate, given the model class, task, grounding and verification you have in place. A heuristic sense-check, not a benchmark.
- [AI Image Generation Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/image-generation-cost-calculator/): Estimate the monthly and annual cost of generating AI images across DALL-E 3, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion XL, Imagen 3 and Flux Pro. Side-by-side comparison.
- [LLM Token Usage Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/llm-token-usage-calculator/): Estimate LLM API costs across Claude, GPT, Gemini and DeepSeek. Tokens in and out, per-call cost, daily, monthly and annual totals. Side-by-side model comparison.
- [Prompt Token Estimator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/prompt-token-estimator/): Paste a prompt, pick a model, see the token count. Rough heuristic estimates for GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama and Mistral, with optional cost at your $/1K rate.
- [RAG Pipeline Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/ai/rag-pipeline-cost-calculator/): Estimate the monthly cost of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline. Embedding, vector database, and LLM query costs broken out, with a month-by-month projection.
- [Broadband Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/): Broadband calculators for picking the right speed, plan and package for your household or office. Plain English, no sign-up, workings shown.
- [Broadband Bandwidth Calculator: How Much Speed Do You Really Need? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/broadband-bandwidth-calculator/): Work out how much broadband speed your household actually needs. Free calculator for streaming, gaming, video calls, smart home and working from home.
- [Cloud Backup Time Estimator: How Long Will Your First Backup Take? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/cloud-backup-time-estimator/): Work out how long an initial cloud backup will take for Backblaze, iDrive, Carbonite or any other provider. Factors in protocol overhead, the realistic upload haircut, and overnight-only schedules.
- [File Download Time Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/file-download-time-calculator/): Work out how long a file will actually take to download given your line speed. Decimal megabytes, megabits and gigabits handled correctly, with a 5% protocol overhead baked in and the working shown.
- [ISP Speed Reality Check: What Speed Will You Actually Get? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/isp-speed-reality-check/): Compare the broadband speed your ISP advertises against the realistic speed you will actually see, factoring in line type, attenuation, wifi loss and peak hour contention.
- [Latency Impact Calculator: Is Your Ping Good Enough? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/latency-impact-calculator/): Work out whether your ping, jitter and packet loss are good enough for cloud gaming, FPS, MMOs, video calls, web browsing or SSH. Verdict, score and the maths shown end to end.
- [Streaming Quality Calculator: What Quality Will My Broadband Actually Stream? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/streaming-quality-calculator/): Work out the streaming quality your broadband can actually sustain across Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video and YouTube. Handles concurrent streams and headroom for other traffic.
- [VPN Throughput Calculator: Realistic Speed Through WireGuard, OpenVPN and IPsec | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/vpn-throughput-calculator/): Estimate the realistic throughput of a VPN tunnel given your link speed, protocol, cipher, CPU class and server distance. Identifies whether you are link-bound, encryption-bound or RTT-bound.
- [Web Hosting Storage &amp; Bandwidth Estimator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/web-hosting-estimator/): Work out how much storage and monthly bandwidth your website needs based on your traffic, page weight, media files, and downloadable content. See which hosting tier fits.
- [Business Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/): Business calculators for ROI, VAT, marketing performance and website speed. Browser-only, no sign-up, workings shown on every tool.
- [Break-Even Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/break-even-calculator/): Calculate your break-even point in units and revenue. Enter fixed costs, variable cost per unit, and selling price to see exactly how many sales you need before you start making a profit.
- [Domain Renewal True Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/domain-renewal-true-cost-calculator/): See the real multi-year cost of a domain including the renewal price hike and add-ons: WHOIS privacy, email, DNS and SSL. Optional comparison to a cheaper registrar.
- [Email Marketing ROI Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/email-marketing-roi-calculator/): Work out the return on your email marketing spend. Enter your list size, send frequency, open and click rates, and conversion data to see ROI, cost per conversion, and the minimum list size to break even.
- [Freelance Day Rate Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/freelance-day-rate-calculator/): Calculate the day rate you need to charge as a freelancer or contractor. Enter your income target, billable days, expenses, pension, and downtime to get a realistic day and hourly rate.
- [IT Support Build vs Buy Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/it-support-build-vs-buy-calculator/): Compare the annual cost of hiring in-house IT support against an outsourced managed service. See the verdict, break-even headcount and full workings.
- [Profit Margin Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/profit-margin-calculator/): Calculate gross and net profit margin from revenue and costs, or find the selling price needed to hit a target margin. Shows markup vs margin clearly.
- [ROI Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/roi-calculator/): Work out your return on investment (ROI) as a percentage, net profit and annualised return (CAGR) for any investment. Browser-only, no sign-up.
- [SEO ROI Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/seo-roi-calculator/): Work out the return on your SEO investment. Enter your monthly cost, organic traffic and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit and the break-even traffic threshold.
- [UK VAT Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/uk-vat-calculator/): Add or remove UK VAT at standard (20%), reduced (5%) or zero (0%) rates. See the net, VAT amount and gross instantly. No sign-up, workings shown.
- [Website Performance Budget Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/business/website-speed-budget-calculator/): Set realistic page-weight and Core Web Vitals targets for your site type and audience. See what a slow site is costing you in lost revenue. No sign-up, workings shown.
- [Conversion Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/): Convert between common units: length, mass, volume, temperature, speed and area. Metric and imperial, side by side, in your browser.
- [Cooking Measurements Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/cooking-measurements-converter/): Convert cooking measurements between UK and US conventions: cups, tablespoons, fluid ounces, grams, ounces, gas mark to Celsius. Ingredient cup-to-gram densities included.
- [Fuel Economy Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/fuel-economy-converter/): Convert fuel economy live across MPG (UK), MPG (US), L/100km and km/L. Edit any field, the other three update on the spot. Useful when comparing imported cars or reading European spec sheets.
- [Number Base Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/number-base-converter/): Convert between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal in your browser. Live two-way binding, BigInt internals for large values, and an arbitrary-base option from 2 to 36.
- [Roman Numeral Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/roman-numeral-converter/): Convert between numbers and Roman numerals in either direction. Range 1 to 3,999, malformed numerals flagged, every step of the working shown. Browser-only.
- [Time Zone Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/time-zone-converter/): Convert a date and time between IANA time zones. Pick a source, pick any number of targets, see the day-of-week, date, local time and UTC offset for each. Browser-only, DST handled by your OS.
- [Unit Converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/conversions/unit-converter/): Convert between metric and imperial units: length, mass, volume, temperature, speed, area. Enter a value and see every common unit at once.
- [Cybersecurity Tools | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/): Browser-only cybersecurity tools. Password generation, strength testing, hashing and breach risk scoring. Nothing you type leaves your device.
- [Data Breach Cost Estimator: What a Breach Could Cost Your Business | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/data-breach-cost-estimator/): Estimate the financial impact of a data breach using IBM/Ponemon 2024 benchmarks. Per-record cost, regulatory fine estimates for GDPR and CCPA, and a low/high range.
- [Data Breach Risk Score | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/data-breach-risk-score/): Self-assess your breach exposure across passwords, 2FA, software hygiene and phishing awareness. Get a score and a prioritised fix list, all in your browser.
- [Diceware Passphrase Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/diceware-passphrase-generator/): Generate a memorable Diceware passphrase from the EFF short wordlist (1,296 words) using Web Crypto. Honest entropy figures, separator and capitalisation options, browser-only.
- [Hash Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/hash-generator/): Generate SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 and SHA-1 hashes from text or files entirely in your browser. Web Crypto, no upload, drag a 100MB file in and the hash never leaves the device.
- [Password Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/password-generator/): Cryptographically secure passwords and passphrases generated entirely in your browser. Uses Web Crypto. Disconnect your network and it still works.
- [Password Strength Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/password-strength-calculator/): Test how strong a password really is. Entropy, breach-list check and crack-time estimates, all in your browser. Nothing you type is sent anywhere.
- [SSL Certificate Expiry Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/ssl-certificate-expiry-calculator/): Paste an SSL certificate expiry date or the PEM text and see days remaining, urgency band, and a recommended renewal date. Browser-only date arithmetic, no network call.
- [2FA / TOTP Window Calculator: Acceptance Window and Brute-Force Maths | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/cybersecurity/totp-window-calculator/): Reason about your TOTP authentication window. Pick period, digit count, drift tolerance and clock skew, see effective window in seconds, brute-force odds and a recommended drift setting.
- [Finance Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/): Sensible estimates for everyday money decisions. Browser-only, no sign-up, workings shown on every tool.
- [Compound Interest Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/compound-interest-calculator/): Work out how much your savings or investments grow with compound interest, regular contributions and inflation. Year-by-year breakdown, currency toggle, browser-only.

- [Loan Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/loan-calculator/): Work out the monthly payment, total interest and total cost of a personal loan, car loan or student loan. See how much an extra monthly payment saves you. Browser-only, no sign-up.
- [US Mortgage Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/mortgage-calculator/): US mortgage calculator. Work out your monthly mortgage payment in dollars, including principal, interest, property tax, home insurance, HOA, and PMI, with the total interest and total cost over the life of the loan.
- [Savings Goal Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/savings-goal-calculator/): Work out how much to save per month to hit a target amount by a target date. Factors in starting balance and optional interest. Currency toggle included.
- [Tip Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/tip-calculator/): Work out the tip on any bill, split it between any number of people, and round up to a whole number per person if you want it to. Currency toggle included.
- [UK Mortgage Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/uk-mortgage-calculator/): UK mortgage calculator. Work out your monthly payment in pounds during the fixed-rate period and after it reverts to the lender
- [UK Salary Tax Calculator 2025/26 | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/uk-salary-tax-calculator/): UK take-home pay calculator for 2025/26. Enter your gross salary to see income tax, National Insurance, student loan deductions and monthly take-home. England, Wales and Northern Ireland rates.
- [UK Stamp Duty Calculator 2025/26 | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/finance/uk-stamp-duty-calculator/): UK Stamp Duty Land Tax calculator for England and Northern Ireland, 2025/26 rates. Covers standard purchases, first-time buyers and additional properties. Shows full band breakdown.

- [Decision Wheel | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/fun/decision-wheel/): Spin a wheel to pick from a list of options. Browser-only, cryptographically unbiased, with an optional remove-winner mode for tournament-style elimination.
- [Dice and Coin Roller | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/fun/dice-and-coin-roller/): Roll any combination of tabletop dice (2d6, 1d20+5, 4d6kh3) or flip up to 1000 coins. Browser-only, uses Web Crypto for an unbiased draw. Nothing transmitted.
- [Magic 8-Ball Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/fun/magic-8-ball/): Ask a yes/no question and the Magic 8-Ball gives you one of the 20 canonical Mattel answers. Browser-only, cryptographically unbiased, no Math.random.
- [Random Name Picker | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/fun/random-name-picker/): Paste a list of names, choose how many to pick, get a fair random selection. Browser-only, uses Web Crypto for unbiased picks. Nothing you paste leaves the device.
- [Health Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/): Quick health and fitness numbers, with the caveats made plain. Nothing on this page is medical advice.
- [BMI Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/bmi-calculator/): Free BMI calculator. Type your weight and height in metric or imperial units and see your body mass index with the WHO category, plus the workings and the honest caveats.
- [Calorie Calculator: BMR and Daily Needs | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/calorie-calculator/): Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and daily calorie needs based on your age, weight, height and activity level. See how many calories to eat to lose, maintain or gain weight.
- [Macro Split Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/macro-split-calculator/): Split a daily calorie target into grams of protein, carbs and fat. Pick a preset (balanced, high-protein cut, endurance, keto) or set a custom ratio. Per-meal breakdown included.
- [Pregnancy Due Date Calculator: LMP, Conception and IVF | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/pregnancy-due-date-calculator/): Work out your estimated due date from your last menstrual period, conception date, or IVF transfer date. Gestational age, trimesters and key milestone dates included.
- [Running Pace Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/running-pace-calculator/): Calculate your running pace, total finish time, or distance covered. Enter any two of pace, distance, and time. Metric and imperial. Race time predictions for 5K, 10K, half marathon and marathon.
- [TDEE Calculator: Total Daily Energy Expenditure | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/health/tdee-calculator/): Work out your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) and BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor, Harris-Benedict or Katch-McArdle. Calorie targets for cutting, maintenance and bulking, plus a starting macro split.

Drop in a GPX file and a target flat pace, get an adjusted finish time, the toughest sections, and the time you

Drop in a GPX route, set your weight and target flat speed (or power), get a physics-based finish time, the categorised climbs, and your top descent speed.

- [Aspect Ratio Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/aspect-ratio-calculator/): Work out the matching width or height that keeps an image or video at the same aspect ratio. Live two-way binding, simplified ratio shown (e.g. 1920x1080 = 16:9), preset ratios in one click. Browser-only.
- [Color Depth &amp; Storage Calculator: Bits, Bytes and Total Colours | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/color-depth-calculator/): Work out the uncompressed size of an image, the total number of colours each bit depth can represent, and how it compares to a typical JPEG or PNG.
- [HEIC to JPG Converter | Free, browser-only HEIC converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/heic-to-jpg-converter/): Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG, PNG or WebP in your browser. Drag in a single photo or a whole holiday
- [Image Compressor: get any photo under 2MB or 500KB | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/image-compressor/): Compress JPG, PNG and WebP photos in your browser. Hit a target file size like 2MB or 500KB, or pick a quality. Multiple files, no upload, no sign-up.

- [Photo Resizer | Free, browser-only image resizer | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/photo-resizer/): Resize and convert photos in your browser. Pick a width, a height, a format and a quality. Your image never leaves your device. No sign-up, no upload.
- [WebP to JPG Converter | Free, browser-only WebP converter | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/images/webp-to-jpg-converter/): Convert WebP images to JPG or PNG in your browser. Drag, drop, save. Bulk conversion, no upload, no sign-up. Fixes the Chrome WebP problem.
- [Math Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/): Everyday maths calculators in plain English. Percentages, ratios, and the numbers people actually need, with the workings shown.
- [Combinations &amp; Permutations Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/combinations-permutations-calculator/): Work out nCr, nPr, factorials and multinomials with arbitrary precision. Handles repetition variants and shows the formula and step-by-step working.
- [Discount Calculator: Sale Price, Stacked Discounts, Tax | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/discount-calculator/): Work out a sale price from a percent off, stacked discounts, tax-inclusive or exclusive prices, and Buy X Get Y Free deals. Plain English, workings shown.
- [Fraction Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/fraction-calculator/): Add, subtract, multiply or divide fractions, including mixed numbers. Get the simplified result, the mixed-number form and the decimal, with the working shown step by step.
- [GCD and LCM Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/gcd-lcm-calculator/): Find the greatest common divisor and lowest common multiple of two or more whole numbers. Shows the Euclidean algorithm, prime factorisations and the LCM working step by step.
- [Logarithm Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/logarithm-calculator/): Calculate log base b of x for any positive base. Solve for the log, for x, or for the base. High-precision result, change-of-base working and a useful identities reminder.
- [Percentage Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/percentage-calculator/): Free percentage calculator. Work out a percentage of a number, what percent one number is of another, or the percentage change between two values. No sign-up, workings shown.
- [Quadratic Equation Solver | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/quadratic-equation-solver/): Solve any quadratic ax&sup2; + bx + c = 0. Get the two roots, the discriminant, the vertex, the axis of symmetry and the y-intercept, with the working shown step by step.
- [Standard Deviation Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/math/standard-deviation-calculator/): Paste a list of numbers and get count, mean, median, range, variance and standard deviation, sample and population, with the working shown step by step.
- [Productivity Tools | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/): Browser-based productivity tools for everyday tasks. No sign-up, no uploads, workings shown.
- [iCal Event Generator | Create .ics Calendar Files | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/ical-event-generator/): Create a .ics calendar file for any event. Set the date, time, timezone, location and recurrence, then download and import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook or any other calendar app.
- [Meeting Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/meeting-cost-calculator/): Work out what a meeting actually costs. Attendees, salaries, overheads, duration, plus an annualised figure if it runs every week, and a live cost ticker.
- [Pomodoro Session Planner | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/pomodoro-session-planner/): Work out how many Pomodoro sessions a task needs, the total focus and break time, and a realistic finish time. Honest about how much focus a human can do in one day.
- [Project Deadline Countdown Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/project-deadline-countdown-calculator/): Count the calendar days, working days and working hours left until a project deadline. Skips weekends and holidays you paste in. Browser-only, no sign-up.
- [Sprint Capacity Planner | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/sprint-capacity-planner/): Plan a sprint by team capacity, not by gut feel. Per-person availability, holidays, ceremonies and focus factor combine into person-hours, person-days and a story-point forecast with a confidence band.
- [Time Card Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/productivity/time-card-calculator/): A weekly timesheet calculator. Enter start and end times, plus unpaid breaks, for each day. Get hours per day, total hours for the week, and optional pay if you add an hourly rate. Handles overnight shifts.
- [Property Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/): Property calculators for buyers, landlords and owners: rental yield, cash flow, return on deposit. Clear workings, currency toggle, nothing uploaded.
- [Rental Yield Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/rental-yield-calculator/): Calculate gross and net rental yield on a buy-to-let property. Optional cash-on-cash return based on your deposit and mortgage payment. Currency toggle, workings shown.
- [UK House Move Cost Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/uk-house-move-cost-calculator/): UK house move cost calculator. Estimate stamp duty (SDLT, LBTT or LTT), conveyancing, mortgage fees, survey, removals, EPC and estate agent in one go.
- [UK Leasehold Ground Rent &amp; Service Charge Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/uk-leasehold-ground-rent-service-charge-calculator/): UK leasehold calculator that projects ground rent and service charge over the years you choose, including doubling clauses, RPI escalation, and the 2022 peppercorn cap.
- [UK Mortgage Overpayment Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/uk-mortgage-overpayment-calculator/): UK mortgage overpayment calculator. See how much interest you save and how many years you shave off by paying extra each month or making a one-off lump sum.
- [UK Rent vs Buy Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/uk-rent-vs-buy-calculator/): UK rent vs buy calculator. Compare the true cost of buying a home against renting over any time horizon, including stamp duty, mortgage interest, maintenance, and the opportunity cost of the deposit.
- [UK Section 24 Buy-to-Let Tax Impact Calculator 2025/26 | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/property/uk-section-24-buy-to-let-tax-impact-calculator/): UK Section 24 calculator. Compare your buy-to-let tax bill under the old full mortgage interest deduction against the current 20% credit, plus the limited company route.
- [SEO Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/seo/): Practical SEO tools: URL slug generator, meta length checker, and more. Nothing uploaded, nothing stored, just useful numbers and tidy outputs.
- [Keyword Density Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/seo/keyword-density-calculator/): Paste in a page or article and see word counts plus 1-, 2- and 3-gram keyword density tables. Optional stop-word filter, runs in your browser, nothing uploaded.

- [SERP CTR Estimator by Position | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/seo/serp-ctr-estimator/): Forecast monthly clicks from a target Google ranking. Pick a CTR curve (Advanced Web Ranking 2024 or Backlinko 2024), set SERP features and branded weighting, see expected clicks with a low and high band.
- [SERP Snippet Preview Tool | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/seo/serp-snippet-preview/): Preview how your page title, meta description and URL render in Google
- [URL Slug Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/seo/url-slug-generator/): Turn any heading into a clean URL slug: lowercase, hyphenated, ASCII-safe, optionally trimmed to length. Runs in your browser, nothing uploaded.

- [Save the Date Calculator: Wedding Planning Timeline | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/save-the-date-calculator/): Enter your wedding date to get a personalised planning timeline: when to send save-the-dates, invitations, RSVP deadlines, vendor bookings, and final preparations.
- [Wedding Anniversary Calculator: Year, Traditional and Modern Gifts | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-anniversary-calculator/): Enter your wedding date to find out which anniversary you are celebrating, the traditional and modern gift themes, and your upcoming milestone anniversaries.
- [Wedding Budget Calculator: Cost Breakdown by Category | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-budget-calculator/): Enter your total wedding budget and guest count to get a recommended spend breakdown across venue, catering, photography, flowers, attire, and more.
- [Wedding Catering Calculator: Portions and Food Quantities | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-catering-calculator/): Enter your guest count, meal style, and number of courses to get portion counts and food weight estimates for canapés, starter, main, dessert, evening food, and tea and coffee.
- [Wedding Day Timeline Generator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-day-timeline/): Enter your ceremony time and reception end time to generate a personalised wedding day schedule: prep, ceremony, photos, drinks reception, speeches, first dance, and carriages.
- [Wedding Drinks Calculator: How Many Bottles? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-drinks-calculator/): Work out how many bottles of wine, prosecco, beer, and spirits you need for your wedding. Enter guest count, reception length, and drinking style to get quantities for each phase of the day.
- [Wedding Table Planner Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/wedding/wedding-table-planner/): Enter your guest count and preferred table size to find out how many tables you need, how many seats will be spare, and how alternative table sizes compare.
- [Writing Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/): Tools for writers, editors and marketers. Count words, estimate reading time, and check lengths without copying anything into a tool that keeps it.
- [English to Suffolk Translator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/english-to-suffolk-translator/): Paste any English text and see it transformed into Suffolk dialect. Based on the vocabulary Charlie Haylock documents in Larn Yarself Silly Suffolk.
- [Flesch Reading Ease Score Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/flesch-reading-ease-calculator/): Paste text and get the Flesch Reading Ease score and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level, with the underlying word, sentence and syllable counts. Runs in your browser, nothing uploaded.
- [Headline Power-Word Score | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/headline-power-word-score/): Score any headline out of 100 against power words, length, sentiment, numbers, filler and format. Tells you whether your headline is Killer, Strong, Average or Weak, with suggestions to fix it.
- [Read Time Calculator | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/read-time-calculator/): Paste any text and see how long it takes to read silently or aloud. Plus word, character and sentence counts. Nothing uploaded, all in your browser.

- [Word Count Tool | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/writing/word-count/): Paste any text and see word count, character count, sentences, paragraphs, and whether it fits inside tweet, meta description, SMS or SEO title limits.
- [Contact | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/contact/): How to reach WebCaretakers. Two email addresses, honest expectations, and a signpost to Yeseo for consulting work.
- [Privacy Policy | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/privacy/): How WebCaretakers handles cookies, analytics, advertising and affiliate links. Plain-English privacy policy, not a generator template.
